topRepos.name: Sound_And_Emoji_IOS
topRepos.description: A KernelSU / KernelSU Next and Magisk-compatible module that replaces default Android system sounds and emojis with custom or iOS-style assets. Designed for full compatibility across rooted devices without modifying the system partition, offering a seamless and clean customization experience.

topRepos.name: Blur_And_StatusBar_IOS
topRepos.description: A KernelSU / KernelSU Next and Magisk-compatible module for HyperOS that replaces the system's Blur and Status Bar with iOS-style elements. Designed to bring a cleaner, modern iOS-inspired look and feel to supported Android devices, without modifying the system partition.

topRepos.name: Discord_DashBoard
topRepos.description: A modern web-based dashboard designed to manage video notification channels, monitor user statistics, and provide extended control features. Built for flexibility, real-time insights, and streamlined administration of content and user interactions.

topRepos.name: SystemPersist_UIPlugin
topRepos.description: A KernelSU / KernelSU Next and Magisk-compatible module designed for HyperOS. It replaces the system’s Notification Panel, Quick Settings, and persist configurations with modified versions to enable advanced customization and behavior enhancements. Ideal for users seeking deeper UI modifications without altering the system partition.

topRepos.name: Assault_Cube_Trainer
topRepos.description: Basic Cheat Trainer for AssaultCube using a CMD interface. Includes One Hit Kill, Freeze Enemies, Unlimited Health, Unlimited Ammo, Infinite Shield, and Unlimited Bullets. Designed for educational purposes, local testing, and learning memory manipulation techniques using C++.

topRepos.name: Assault_Cube_Trainer_with_Esp
topRepos.description: Basic Cheat Trainer for AssaultCube – A Windows Forms-based trainer featuring One Hit Kill, Freeze Enemies, ESP (Wallhack), and more. Designed for local gameplay and educational purposes, it allows memory manipulation to explore game hacking concepts with a simple and intuitive GUI.

topRepos.name: Clippy_Revenge
topRepos.description: Got a friend you want to gently drive insane? This app runs silently in the background and flashes random, unnerving messages on their screen. The perfect digital poltergeist for harmless pranks. Built with C# and some Win32 magic.

repositories.name: AndroidAuto_Systemizer
repositories.description: Systemless module that provisions Android Auto as a privileged app (priv-app) in /product via overlay, applying a privileged permission allowlist, RRO, and boot scripts for runtime grants and automotive role, with multi-root compatibility and bootloop mitigation.

Designed for educational purposes, local testing, and learning memory manipulation techniques using C++.

repositories.name: Clash_of_Clans_Attackbase_Finder
repositories.description: Open Clans Screen Automation is an Android application that performs real-time screen capture and touch automation based on text recognition using ML Kit. It is designed to detect specific values displayed on the screen and trigger automatic touches only when certain conditions are not met.

repositories.description: Got a friend you want to gently drive insane? This app runs silently in the background and flashes random, unnerving messages on their screen. The perfect digital poltergeist for harmless pranks. Built with C# and some Win32 magic.

repositories.name: Discord_DashBoard
repositories.description: A modern web-based dashboard designed to manage video notification channels, monitor user statistics, and provide extended control features. Built for flexibility, real-time insights, and streamlined administration of content and user interactions.

repositories.name: Discord_ManagerBot
repositories.description: A powerful and customizable Discord bot with support for automatic YouTube and Twitch video notifications, real-time user statistics tracking, and additional community management features. Ideal for content creators, streamers, and server admins looking to automate and enhance engagement.

repositories.name: Discord_MusicBot
repositories.description: Music bot for Discord, developed in Node.js with integration to YouTube and Spotify. It offers high-quality playback, queue management, and interactive commands for a professional experience.

repositories.name: Finance_App
repositories.description: Basic Android App To Control Your Finances

repositories.name: Forensic_Brute_Force
repositories.description: High-performance cryptographic auditing and forensic framework built in C++17. Features native GPU acceleration (CUDA/OpenCL) for analyzing 16+ hash algorithms and security protocols.

repositories.name: Forensic_Hex_Dumper
repositories.description: A powerful CLI forensic file analysis tool built in C# .NET 8.0. Identifies 130+ file signatures, extracts deep metadata, and performs anti-forensic detection.

repositories.name: Forensic_Redact_Breaker
repositories.description: Native C++17 forensic tool for analyzing PDF redaction failures. Features a custom binary parser, vector/raster redaction detection via GDI+, and text recovery capabilities. Zero external dependencies.

repositories.name: Genius_1980
repositories.description: Basic Android Game Genius 1980

repositories.name: Lies_Of_P_Trainer
repositories.description: A basic external Cheat Trainer for Lies of P with a command-line interface (CMD version). Developed for educational purposes, it allows basic memory manipulation features like health editing, stamina locking, and more—ideal for reverse engineering practice and game hacking fundamentals.

repositories.name: Markdown_Editor
repositories.description: A modern, distraction-free Markdown editor built for writers and developers. Experience real-time preview, synchronized scrolling, and seamless export options in a sleek interface.

repositories.name: Python_Game
repositories.description: Basic Generic Space Invaders Demo

repositories.name: Windows10-11-Reverse_Shell
repositories.description: This repository contains a set of penetration testing scripts designed strictly for educational and research purposes. It includes batch-based automation for file system manipulation (folder deletion), process termination, and the creation of reverse shells on Windows environments
